P12.rationale: 9-cell base (one per family×difficulty) + one extra MEDIUM per family (signal-rich tier); first-N within each bucket by sorted unified_episode_id.

P24.rationale: Equal family totals; MEDIUM emphasis; nested superset of P12.

P48.rationale: Equal family totals; MEDIUM emphasis; nested superset of P24.

repeat_lane_note: P12_repeat uses the same unified_episode_ids as P12.
selector_note: Nested deterministic subsets within each M09 family block; per-difficulty first-N by sorted unified_episode_id; iteration order = M09 block order (index-stable).
